# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: app-service-server
spec:
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          labels:
            app: app-service
      allow:
        principals:
          - "app-service"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: app-service-authz
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: app-service-server
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          labels:
            app: db-service
      allow:
        principals:
          - "db-service"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: db-service-authz
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: db-service-server
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          labels:
            app: app-service
      allow:
        principals:
          - "app-service"
